rules.description: Every rule encodes a value system. To follow a rule is to endorse a set of assumptions about what making is for and who it is for.
rules.process: I wrote down every instruction I had ever been given in an educational or professional context. Reading them together revealed a coherent ideology I had never consciously agreed to.

rules.description: Creative license is not granted — it is claimed. The belief that you require external permission to make something is itself a rule worth breaking.
rules.process: I made work in spaces and formats that I had previously considered outside my authority. The resistance I encountered was mostly internal.
